scope: custom: core_engine + combat + derived_stats -- R2 consequence atom (armature reset 2026-05-29)
note: Wound severity on a landing strike + the authoritative wound-gate tracker -- where Strength and Endurance get their teeth against Agility's sigma-leverage (R1). Canonical damage formula reinstated by Jordan this session (M9 had removed multipliers): damage = net + STR x multiplier + weapon-modifier-vs-armour-tier; crit (net>=3) doubles ONLY the weapon modifier (PP-211), NOT the STR term. The armour model is ALREADY UNIFIED in canon (combat_v30 §6: 'DR is subsumed into the weapon modifier vs armour tier table') -- the Build-0 §3.1 reconcile is resolved BY CANON, not by a design choice; M9's per-type armour_resist is retained only as the historical validation ORACLE (plate negates cut / blunt defeats plate), never as a second subtractor. Wound-gate tracker is derived_stats §4.1 AUTHORITATIVE (supersedes combat_v30 §7's uncapped MW): Health=(End+6)x(MW+1), MW=min(floor(End/2)+1,3) PP-717 cap, WI=End+6, non-resetting, a hit>WI crosses multiple gates, felled at MW+1, -1D/wound no Ob. This bounds the reinstated multiplier: one-exchange phrase + MW+1<=4 gate cap + armour-typed resistance => the M8 30-round attrition runaway cannot recur. Reuses M3 (Class A weapon layer). Class A = canonical; Class C = the one proposed framing (decisive multi-gate applied per-exchange not per-round). PROPOSAL -- no canon edited.

entries.quoted_text: Damage = net hits + (STR x multiplier) + weapon modifier vs armour tier. STR multiplier: Light x1, Heavy x2, Blade x1, Blunt x1.5. Multiplicative (Heavy Blunt=x3). NOT doubled on crit.
Critical Hit: net hits >= 3 -> weapon modifier doubled before applying armour reduction. (PP-211)
weapon modifier doubled before applying armour reduction. ... NOT doubled on crit [refers to STR multiplier term; the weapon modifier is the doubled term].
Damage Reduction (DR) is subsumed into the weapon modifier vs armour tier table (see Damage Resolution above).

entries.value: Light Blade +3/+2/+1/+0; Heavy Blade +6/+4/+2/+0; Light Blunt +3 all; Heavy Blunt +5 all
entries.section: §5 Damage Resolution (weapon modifier vs armour tier)
entries.quoted_text: Weapon modifier vs armour tier: Light Blade +3/+2/+1/+0; Heavy Blade +6/+4/+2/+0; Light Blunt +3/+3/+3/+3; Heavy Blunt +5/+5/+5/+5 (vs None/Light/Medium/Heavy).

Health (full) = (Endurance + 6) x (Max Wounds + 1) = WI x (MW+1). Non-resetting grand total. Each wound subtracts WI. Felled at 0 Health = MW+1 wounds. Damage > WI in one hit: multiple wounds applied simultaneously.
Wound penalty: -1D to ALL Pools. Universal rule. No Ob penalty from wounds, ever. Cumulative; capped by per-Pool floor (Combat Pool floor 5).

entries.value: single hit > WI crosses multiple gates at once (per-exchange, not per-round attrition)
entries.class: C-proposed (armature framing; canonical formula applied per-exchange; NOT a new constant)
entries.quoted_text: Damage > WI in one hit: multiple wounds applied simultaneously (each WI of damage = +1 wound counter). [Armature framing: applied within ONE 6-10s exchange, not summed over a 30-round attrition loop -- the gate cap MW+1<=4 + armour-typed resistance bound the reinstated multiplier so the M8 runaway cannot recur.]
